summary: 8 film announcements, 12 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Shot in the Dark
film.studio: Artists Equity, Hidden Content, Ultraboom Media, Icki Eneo Arlo
film.announcement: Documentary following the first U.S. Paralympic blind soccer team announced as a partnership between Artists Equity, Hidden Content, Ultraboom Media, and Icki Eneo Arlo.

film.title: Atari Game Properties
film.announcement: Universal Pictures secures deal with Atari to develop films based on 10 iconic game properties, with original script by Matt Reilly and Carl Hampe, and Entertainment 360 producing the first project.

film.title: The Joy of Sex
film.talent: Sharon Maguire (director), Colin Firth, Julianne Moore, Laura Linney, David Tennant
film.announcement: Love triangle comedy directed by Sharon Maguire starring Colin Firth, Julianne Moore, Laura Linney, and David Tennant pre-sells to Lionsgate, Wild Bunch and other distributors.

film.title: George Michael: The Faith Tour
film.studio: Bleecker Street, Universal Pictures Content Group
film.announcement: Concert film acquired by Bleecker Street's Crosswalk and Universal Pictures Content Group.

film.title: The Day Before
film.announcement: Lilly Wachowski boards Alexandra Grey's sci-fi short as executive producer.

film.title: Hadestown
film.announcement: Live capture film adaptation of the musical Hadestown set to hit theaters.

film.title: Katy Perry: The Lifetimes Tour - Live From Paris
film.announcement: Concert documentary from Katy Perry's Lifetimes Tour set for theatrical release in September.

film.title: Armony
film.announcement: Dario Albertini's film set for world premiere at Locarno Film Festival and secures Swiss distribution with Xenix.

tv.title: Percy Jackson and the Olympians
tv.announcement: Season 3 premiere date set for November, with first footage from 'The Titan's Curse' shown at Comic-Con.

tv.title: Cable Guy
tv.announcement: Natasha Rothwell joins Hulu's Cable Guy pilot.

tv.title: Shōgun
tv.announcement: Rick Kumazawa joins Season 2 as recurring cast member.

tv.title: Myron Bolitar
tv.talent: Melissa Benoist, Bebe Neuwirth, Jamie Hector, Quincy Isaiah
tv.announcement: Series adds 10 cast members including Melissa Benoist, Bebe Neuwirth, Jamie Hector, and Quincy Isaiah.

tv.title: The Morning Show
tv.announcement: Series renewed for final season 5, confirming the show's ending.

tv.title: The Run For a Million
tv.announcement: Equine competition special by Taylor Sheridan ordered for CBS.

tv.title: Saint-Pierre
tv.announcement: Season 3 cast additions announced with first look footage revealed.

tv.title: Open Water
tv.talent: Toheeb Jimoh, Dujonna Gift, Caleb Nelson
tv.announcement: BBC adaptation of Open Water cast with Toheeb Jimoh and Dujonna Gift in lead roles.

tv.title: Law & Order
tv.announcement: Reid Scott exits the series; James Badge Dale replaces him for Season 26.

tv.title: Beauty in Black
tv.announcement: Tyler Perry series renewed for Season 4 at Netflix.

tv.title: Carrie
tv.announcement: Mike Flanagan's Carrie TV series announced for Toronto Film Festival Primetime 2026 program.

tv.title: The Last Person on Earth
tv.announcement: Apple TV+ orders its first dating show with this title.
